zh.lifeSummary: 當John Lewis於1666年1月1日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波時，他的父親Edward Lewis31歲，母親Hannah Cobb26歲。他於1695年1月4日與Elizabeth Huckins在美國麻薩諸塞州巴恩斯塔波結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1738年3月5日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波巴恩斯塔波享年72歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波巴恩斯塔波。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Lewis于1666年1月1日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波时，他的父亲Edward Lewis31岁，母亲Hannah Cobb26岁。他于1695年1月4日与Elizabeth Huckins在美国马萨诸塞州巴恩斯塔波结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1738年3月5日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波巴恩斯塔波享年72岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波巴恩斯塔波。

nameMeanings.name: Lewis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English, Old French personal name Lewis, Leweis, Lowis, from ancient Germanic (originally West Frankish) Hludwig (itself from hlōd- ‘fame, famous’ + wīg- ‘battle’). This was Latinized as Ludovicus and Chlodovisus, which were gallicized as Clovis or Clouis, French Louis. The name may also appear as Lawis, Laweys, Lawes, by unrounding of the vowel of Lowis on the analogy of the variation between Low and Law as pet forms of Middle English Lourence alias Laurence. This surname is also very common among African Americans. See Laws 2 and compare Lawrence .
Welsh: adopted for the Welsh personal name Llywelyn (see Llewellyn ).

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Lughaidh ‘son of Lughaidh’. This is one of the most common Old Irish personal names. It is derived from Lugh ‘brightness’, which was the name of a Celtic god.

variants.name: Laws
meanings: English: variant of Law (pet form of Lawrence ), with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.
Perhaps a shortened form of Scottish or Irish   McLeish  . Compare   McLaws  .

variants.name: Lewison
meanings: Welsh and English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name   Lewis   (in Wales this was taken as equivalent to the Welsh personal name   Llewelyn  ). In North America, this surname has reportedly absorbed in some cases the Greek patronymic   Iliopoulos  .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): patronymic from the personal name Lewi, Polish-influenced form of Levy .

variants.name: McGlew
meanings: Irish: most probably from Mac Lughaidh ‘son of Lughaidh’, a Gaelic personal name (referencing the god Lugh), sometimes Anglicized as Lewis . However, both Woulfe and MacLysaght consider McGlew to be a shortened form of Mac Dhuinnshléibhe (see McAleavey and Dunleavy ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Lewis was born on 1 January 1666, in Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, his father, Edward Lewis, was 31 and his mother, Hannah Cobb, was 26. He married Elizabeth Huckins on 4 January 1695, in Barnstable, Massachusetts, United States. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 5 March 1738, in Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 72, and was buried in Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Lewis est né le 1 janvier 1666, à Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Edward Lewis, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Hannah Cobb, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Huckins le 4 janvier 1695, à Barnstable, Massachusetts, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 5 mars 1738, à Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Lewis am 1. Januar 1666 in Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater Edward Lewis 31 und seine Mutter Hannah Cobb 26. Er hat am 4. Januar 1695 in Barnstable, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten Elizabeth Huckins geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 5. März 1738 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Lewis è nato il il 1 gennaio 1666 nel Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Edward Lewis, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Hannah Cobb, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Huckins il 4 gennaio 1695, nel Barnstable, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 5 marzo 1738, nel Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: John Lewisが1666年1月1日にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーバーンスタブルで生まれた時，父Edward Lewisは31歳，母Hannah Cobbは26歳であった。1695年1月4日にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州バーンスタブルでElizabeth Huckinsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1738年3月5日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーバーンスタブルバーンスタブルで72歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーバーンスタブルバーンスタブルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Lewis(이)가 1666년 1월 1일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 바른스타블일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edward Lewis(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Hannah Cobb(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1695년 1월 4일 미국 매사추세츠 주 바른스타블일에서 Elizabeth Huckins(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1738년 3월 5일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일 바른스타블일에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일 바른스타블일에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Lewis nasceu em 1 de janeiro de 1666, em Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Edward Lewis, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Hannah Cobb, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Huckins em 4 de janeiro de 1695, em Barnstable, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 5 de março de 1738, em Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Lewis родился 1 января 1666 г. в местности барнстабл, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Edward Lewis было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Hannah Cobb, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Huckins 4 января 1695 г. в местности барнстабл, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 5 марта 1738 г. в местности барнстабл, барнстабл, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности барнстабл, барнстабл, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Lewis nació el 1 de enero de 1666, en Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Edward Lewis, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Hannah Cobb, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Huckins el 4 de enero de 1695, en Barnstable, Masachusets, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 5 de marzo de 1738, en Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
